rss.channel:
朝九晚五 https://9to5mac.com/ Apple 新闻和 Mac 谣言全天爆发2026 年 3 月 23 日星期一 20:19:13 +0000 en-US每小时1 https://wordpress.org/?v=6.9.4 https://9to5mac.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/6/2019/10/cropped-cropped-mac1-1.png?w=32朝九晚五https://9to5mac.com/ 32 32 146091842 报告：在供应限制的情况下，人工智能需求可能会在 2026 年推动智能手机存储容量的提高https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/report-ai-requirements-could-push-higher-smartphone-storage-in-2026-amid-supply-constraints/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/report-ai-requirements-could-push-higher-smartphone-storage-in-2026-amid-supply-constraints/#respondMarcus Mendes Mon, 23 Mar 2026 20:19:13 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044700

虽然 NAND 闪存价格上涨和供应紧张预计将拖累 2026 年智能手机规格，但一份新报告称，人工智能需求实际上将推高平均存储容量。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/report-ai-requirements-could-push-higher-smartphone-storage-in-2026-amid-supply-constraints/feed/ 0 1044700 iOS 26.4 提供两项 Liquid Glass 定制更新https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/ios-26-4-offers-two-liquid-glass-customization-updates/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/ios-26-4-offers-two-liquid-glass-customization-updates/#respondRyan Christoffel Mon, 23 Mar 2026 20:06:18 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044696

iOS 26.4 即将发布，它将带来两项关于如何在 iPhone 上自定义液体玻璃设计的更新。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/ios-26-4-offers-two-liquid-glass-customization-updates/feed/ 0 1044696 据传言，苹果有六款新产品即将推出https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-has-six-new-products-that-c​​ould-launch-soon-per-rumors/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-has-six-new-products-that-c​​ould-launch-soon-per-rumors/#respondRyan Christoffel Mon, 23 Mar 2026 19:07:34 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044674

苹果今年已经推出了许多新产品，但据传还有六款产品可能会在未来几周和几个月内首次亮相。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-has-six-new-products-that-c​​ould-launch-soon-per-rumors/feed/ 0 1044674 Apple 钱包学生 ID 明年将扩展到主要新学校https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-wallet-student-ids-expanding-to-the-university-of-texas-next-year/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-wallet-student-ids-expanding-to-the-university-of-texas-next-year/#respondChance Miller Mon, 23 Mar 2026 18:50:33 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044686

德克萨斯大学宣布将从明年开始推出数字大学 ID。据该大学称，这些数字身份证将支持苹果钱包集成，并让学生可以进入建筑物、购买餐饮等。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-wallet-student-ids-expanding-to-the-university-of-texas-next-year/feed/ 0 1044686 随着 50 周年庆祝活动的继续，英国 Apple Store 商店列出了特殊营业时间https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/uk-apple-store-lists-special-hours-as-50th-anniversary-celebration-events-continue/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/uk-apple-store-lists-special-hours-as-50th-anniversary-celebration-events-continue/#respondZac Hall Mon, 23 Mar 2026 18:48:19 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044678

Apple 正在全球范围内举办特别活动来庆祝其成立 50 周年。一条新线索可能会指出下一次庆祝活动的时间和地点。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/uk-apple-store-lists-special-hours-as-50th-anniversary-celebration-events-continue/feed/ 0 1044678 这是 4 月份 Apple TV 的所有新品https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/heres-everything-new-apple-tv-has-coming-in-april/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/heres-everything-new-apple-tv-has-coming-in-april/#respondRyan Christoffel Mon, 23 Mar 2026 18:17:05 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044635

Apple TV 即将迎来一个充实的四月，其中包括新剧集和回归剧集、大型电影首映、三项体育节目等等。以下是 Apple TV 4 月份的所有新功能。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/heres-everything-new-apple-tv-has-coming-in-april/feed/ 0 1044635 苹果称将在今年的 WWDC 上公布“人工智能进步” https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-promises-ai-advancements-to-be-unveiled-at-wwdc-this-year/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-promises-ai-advancements-to-be-unveiled-at-wwdc-this-year/#commentsRyan Christoffel Mon, 23 Mar 2026 17:25:57 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044665

今天，Apple 宣布了 WWDC 2026 的日期：6 月 8 日至 12 日。作为公告新闻稿的一部分，该公司嘲笑“人工智能进步”即将到来。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-promises-ai-advancements-to-be-unveiled-at-wwdc-this-year/feed/ 4 1044665 据报道，苹果地图即将推出广告，以下是我们的期待https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-maps-reportedly-introducing-ads-soon-heres-what-to-expect/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-maps-reportedly-introducing-ads-soon-heres-what-to-expect/#commentsZac Hall Mon, 23 Mar 2026 17:16:37 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044644

据报道，广告投放到苹果地图已经有一段时间了。现在看来，苹果地图可能终于即将引入企业广告了。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-maps-reportedly-introducing-ads-soon-heres-what-to-expect/feed/ 13 1044644 苹果宣布 WWDC 2026 将于 6 月 8 日揭晓 iOS 27 https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-announces-wwdc-2026-for-june-8-ios-27-set-to-be-revealed/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-announces-wwdc-2026-for-june-8-ios-27-set-to-be-revealed/#commentsZac Hall Mon, 23 Mar 2026 16:58:48 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043860

Apple 已正式宣布WWDC 2026，并确定了下一届全球开发者大会的日期。会议将于 6 月 8 日星期一举行主题演讲，我们预计 Apple 将在会上宣布 iOS 27、macOS 27 等。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/apple-announces-wwdc-2026-for-june-8-ios-27-set-to-be-revealed/feed/ 3 1043860 1999 年乔布斯对苹果公司的讲话：我认为未来几年我们将能够真正摇滚起来https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/steve-jobs-apple-1999-video/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/steve-jobs-apple-1999-video/#respondZac Hall Mon, 23 Mar 2026 16:53:03 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044636

帕克·奥托拉尼 (Parker Ortolani) 偶然发现了史蒂夫·乔布斯 (Steve Jobs) 周末与苹果员工交谈的一段令人难以置信的视频。野中晃发表了 1999 年乔布斯的视频。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/steve-jobs-apple-1999-video/feed/ 0 1044636 特惠：Apple Watch Series 11 立减 150 美元，M4 MacBook Air 清仓立减 300 美元，M3 iPad Air 立减 200 美元，Apple Pencil 立减 59 美元等https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/deals-apple-watch-series-11-m4-macbook-air-apple-pencil/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/deals-apple-watch-series-11-m4-macbook-air-apple-pencil/#respondJustin Kahn Mon, 23 Mar 2026 15:40:29 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1044618

今天的9to5Toys 午休活动以亚马逊历史最低价推出， Apple Watch Series 11 钛金款（Slate、Natural 和 Gold）降价 150 美元， Midnight Apple Watch SE 3 款降价 50 美元。除了 AirPods Pro 3 正在进行的假日定价之外，我们还推出了亚马逊 M4 MacBook Air清仓促销，最高可享受 300 美元的折扣，所有11 英寸 M3 iPad Air 电池配置可享受近200 美元的折扣， Apple Pencil (USB-C) 的促销则相对罕见，价格为59 美元。请前往下面仔细查看详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/23/deals-apple-watch-series-11-m4-macbook-air-apple-pencil/feed/ 0 1044618
